description_long: This is a large, upscale residential house with a sprawling footprint and a complex, multi-sectioned layout. The structure features a series of red hip roofs, multiple dormer windows, and a prominent front entryway with steps leading up to a covered porch. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, complemented by arched windows and decorative trim. A circular driveway with a landscaped island leads to a spacious attached garage, while the rear of the house opens onto a large patio area with a swimming pool. The property is surrounded by manicured landscaping, including shrubs and small trees, enhancing its luxurious suburban character.
description: A large, elegant house with red hip roofs, arched windows, a circular driveway, and a backyard pool, surrounded by manicured landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, circular driveway, landscaped island, and attached garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway extension, and the depth of the house layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, swimming pool, and multiple arched windows.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the pool, patio, and landscaping along the house perimeter.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, covered porch, decorative columns, and double doors
